enonce.texte: Exercise 1: Match the compound adjectives with their correct definitions.

questions.texte: Match each compound adjective with its meaning.
questions.reponse: 1. well-known - connu; 2. hard-working - travailleur; 3. good-looking - beau; 4. open-minded - ouvert d'esprit; 5. absent-minded - distrait; 6. easy-going - facile à vivre; 7. self-confident - confiant; 8. kind-hearted - au bon cœur.

sousQuestions.texte: well-known
hard-working
good-looking
open-minded
absent-minded
easy-going
self-confident
kind-hearted

enonce.texte: Exercise 2: Form compound adjectives by combining words from the two columns.

questions.texte: Combine a word from column A with a word from column B to form a compound adjective.
questions.reponse: 1. well-known; 2. hard-working; 3. good-looking; 4. open-minded; 5. absent-minded; 6. easy-going; 7. self-confident; 8. kind-hearted.

sousQuestions.texte: absent + ______

enonce.texte:
Exercise 3: Complete the sentences with the appropriate compound adjectives from the box.

well-known, hard-working, good-looking, open-minded, absent-minded, easy-going, self-confident, kind-hearted

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the correct compound adjective.
questions.reponse: 1. hard-working; 2. well-known; 3. good-looking; 4. open-minded; 5. absent-minded; 6. easy-going; 7. kind-hearted; 8. self-confident.

sousQuestions.texte: She is a ______ student. She always gets good grades.
This is a ______ brand. Everyone knows it.
He is very ______, so many people admire him.
A ______ person is willing to consider new ideas.
My grandfather is ______ and often forgets his glasses.
She never gets angry. She is very ______.
He is very ______ and always helps the poor.
A ______ person believes in their own abilities.

enonce.texte: Exercise 4: Create compound adjectives to describe the following situations.

questions.texte: Describe each situation using a compound adjective.
questions.reponse: 1. well-known; 2. hard-working; 3. good-looking; 4. open-minded; 5. absent-minded; 6. easy-going; 7. self-confident; 8. kind-hearted.

sousQuestions.texte: This actor is famous all over the world.
This employee always works very hard.
She is very attractive.
He accepts different opinions easily.
She often forgets where she puts things.
He is very relaxed and does not stress.
She believes strongly in herself.
He is very generous and cares about others.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 5: Read the text and answer the questions using compound adjectives.

My friend Sarah is a very kind-hearted person. She is always ready to help people in need. She is also hard-working and often stays late to finish her work. Sarah is good-looking and has a beautiful smile. She is very self-confident and speaks in public without fear. However, she is sometimes absent-minded and forgets her appointments. But she is also open-minded and accepts different cultures. Her easy-going personality makes everyone love her.

questions.texte: Answer the questions based on the text.
questions.reponse: 1. kind-hearted; 2. hard-working; 3. good-looking; 4. self-confident; 5. absent-minded; 6. open-minded; 7. easy-going.

sousQuestions.texte: What word describes Sarah's generosity?
What word shows that Sarah works a lot?
What word describes Sarah's physical appearance?
How does Sarah feel about public speaking?
What is Sarah's weakness?
How does Sarah react to different cultures?
What makes Sarah easy to get along with?

enonce.texte: Exercise 6: Write a short paragraph (6-8 sentences) describing a person you know. Use at least 5 compound adjectives.

questions.texte: Write a description of a friend or family member.
questions.reponse: Indicative answer. Example: My mother is a kind-hearted woman who always helps others. She is hard-working and runs her own business. She is good-looking and takes care of herself. My mother is open-minded and respects different opinions. She is sometimes absent-minded, but that makes her charming. She is easy-going and never gets angry. She is self-confident and inspires everyone around her.

sousQuestions.texte: Introduce the person and their relationship to you.
sousQuestions.reponse: My mother is a kind-hearted woman...

sousQuestions.texte: Describe their personality using compound adjectives.
sousQuestions.reponse: She is hard-working, open-minded, easy-going, and self-confident.

sousQuestions.texte: Describe their physical appearance if relevant.
sousQuestions.reponse: She is good-looking and takes care of herself.

sousQuestions.texte: Give a concluding sentence.

enonce.texte: Exercise 7: Analyze the following sentences and identify the compound adjectives. Then, use them in new sentences.

questions.texte: Identify the compound adjectives and create new sentences.
questions.reponse: 1. well-known; 2. hard-working; 3. good-looking; 4. open-minded; 5. absent-minded; 6. easy-going; 7. self-confident; 8. kind-hearted.

sousQuestions.texte: This well-known actor has won many awards.
sousQuestions.reponse: well-known - My school is well-known for its excellent results.

sousQuestions.texte: She is a hard-working employee.
sousQuestions.reponse: hard-working - He is a hard-working student.

sousQuestions.texte: He is very good-looking.
sousQuestions.reponse: good-looking - She is good-looking and intelligent.

sousQuestions.texte: She is an open-minded teacher.
He is absent-minded and forgets his keys.
She is easy-going and friendly.
sousQuestions.reponse: easy-going - He is easy-going and likes to joke.

sousQuestions.texte: He is self-confident in interviews.
sousQuestions.reponse: self-confident - You need to be self-confident to succeed.

sousQuestions.texte: He is kind-hearted and helps the poor.
sousQuestions.reponse: kind-hearted - She is kind-hearted and volunteers at the hospital.

enonce.texte: Exercise 8: Transform the following phrases into compound adjectives.

questions.texte: Rewrite each phrase as a compound adjective.
questions.reponse: 1. well-known; 2. hard-working; 3. good-looking; 4. open-minded; 5. absent-minded; 6. easy-going; 7. self-confident; 8. kind-hearted.

sousQuestions.texte: a person who works hard
a place that is known by many
a person who is attractive
a person who accepts new ideas
a person who often forgets things
a person who is relaxed and easy
a person who believes in themselves
a person with a good heart
